# 31 Vendor Research Evidence Register

Current vendor facts are temporally unstable, so seq_031 stores the official evidence set explicitly.

| Vendor | Families | Captured | Title | URL | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Twilio | telephony_ivr, sms | 2026-04-09 | Test Credentials | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/iam/test-credentials | Twilio exposes test credentials for calls, SMS, lookup, and test number purchase without charges or live-state mutation. |
| Twilio | telephony_ivr, sms | 2026-04-09 | REST API: Subaccounts | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/iam/api/subaccounts | Twilio subaccounts segment calls, messages, recordings, and transcriptions under separate credentials. |
| Twilio | telephony_ivr, sms | 2026-04-09 | Webhooks security | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/usage/webhooks/webhooks-security | Twilio signs inbound requests with X-Twilio-Signature and requires server-side validation over the evolving full parameter set. |
| Twilio | sms | 2026-04-09 | Track the Message Status of Outbound Messages | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/messaging/guides/track-outbound-message-status | Twilio status callbacks cover message lifecycle changes and explicitly warn that callbacks may arrive out of order. |
| Twilio | telephony_ivr | 2026-04-09 | Recordings resource | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/voice/api/recording | Twilio recording events expose RecordingUrl and statuses including in-progress, completed, and absent. |
| Twilio | telephony_ivr, sms | 2026-04-09 | Twilio Regions | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/global-infrastructure/understanding-twilio-regions | Twilio regions support workload placement, but phone numbers and billing stay global account resources and Twilio warns regional residency is not universal yet. |
| Twilio | sms | 2026-04-09 | SMS Pricing in United Kingdom for Text Messaging | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/en-us/sms/pricing/gb | Twilio publishes UK SMS pricing and notes usage-based and carrier-fee components on the public pricing page. |
| Twilio | telephony_ivr | 2026-04-09 | Programmable Voice Pricing in United Kingdom | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/en-us/voice/pricing/gb | Twilio publishes UK voice, media-stream, and number-pricing details publicly. |
| Twilio SendGrid | email | 2026-04-09 | Sandbox Mode | SendGrid Docs | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/sendgrid/for-developers/sending-email/sandbox-mode/ | Sandbox mode validates the request body without delivery or credit consumption, but it does not generate Event Webhook or Email Activity events. |
| Twilio SendGrid | email | 2026-04-09 | Event Webhook Reference | SendGrid Docs | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/sendgrid/for-developers/tracking-events/event | SendGrid event webhooks expose delivery, engagement, and account events and warn not to store PII in categories or unique arguments. |
| Twilio SendGrid | email | 2026-04-09 | Getting Started with the Event Webhook Security Features | SendGrid Docs | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/sendgrid/for-developers/tracking-events/getting-started-event-webhook-security-features | SendGrid supports signed event webhooks with generated public/private key pairs and signature verification. |
| Twilio SendGrid | email | 2026-04-09 | Subusers | SendGrid Docs | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/sendgrid/ui/account-and-settings/subusers/ | SendGrid subusers segment sending, permissions, and credit limits but require a paid account. |
| Twilio SendGrid | email | 2026-04-09 | Domain authentication | SendGrid Docs | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/sendgrid/glossary/domain-authentication | SendGrid requires domain authentication using DKIM, SPF, and DMARC-related setup to improve trust and sender reputation. |
| Twilio SendGrid | email, combined | 2026-04-09 | Migrate Subusers to EU Data Resident Subusers | SendGrid Docs | Twilio | https://www.twilio.com/docs/sendgrid/data-residency/migrate-subusers | SendGrid offers Global and EU subusers, and EU data residency requires paid-account EU subusers with region-pinned sender authentication. |
| Vonage | telephony_ivr | 2026-04-09 | Vonage Voice API Webhook Reference | https://developer.vonage.com/en/voice/voice-api/webhook-reference | Vonage Voice exposes answer, event, record, and fallback webhooks with retry behavior, signed callbacks by default, DTMF handling, and recording URLs. |
| Vonage | sms | 2026-04-09 | SMS API Signatures Guide | Vonage | https://developer.vonage.com/en/getting-started/concepts/signing-messages | Vonage SMS webhooks can be verified with signatures so the receiver can confirm integrity of incoming requests. |
| Vonage | telephony_ivr, sms | 2026-04-09 | Webhooks | Vonage | https://developer.vonage.com/en/getting-started/concepts/webhooks | Vonage frames webhooks as core product contracts and documents signature-secret use for signed requests. |
| Vonage | telephony_ivr, sms | 2026-04-09 | API Pricing: Understanding Vonage Communications API Prices | https://www.vonage.com/communications-apis/pricing/ | Vonage publishes pay-as-you-go voice and messaging API prices and add-on record/report controls on public pricing pages. |
| Vonage | sms | 2026-04-09 | SMS API pricing | Vonage | https://www.vonage.com/communications-apis/sms/pricing/ | Vonage publishes SMS pricing by number class and country and notes that dashboard pricing is authoritative at purchase time. |
| Sinch | telephony_ivr | 2026-04-09 | Callbacks | Voice API | Sinch | https://developers.sinch.com/docs/voice/api-reference/callbacks | Sinch voice callbacks cover incoming, answered, and disconnected call events and allow IVR control via SVAML and REST. |
| Sinch | telephony_ivr | 2026-04-09 | Callback request signing | Voice API | Sinch | https://developers.sinch.com/docs/voice/api-reference/authentication/callback-signed-request/ | Sinch voice supports HMAC-SHA256 callback signing over a deterministic string-to-sign. |
| Sinch | sms | 2026-04-09 | Delivery Report | Sinch SMS | https://developers.sinch.com/docs/sms/api-reference/sms/webhooks/deliveryreport | Sinch SMS delivery reports support callbacks with retry rules and batch-level delivery-report modes. |
| Sinch | sms | 2026-04-09 | Pricing SMS | Sinch | https://sinch.com/pricing/sms/ | Sinch publishes pay-as-you-go SMS pricing and number fees, but broader enterprise support and approval posture remain sales-led. |
| Mailgun | email | 2026-04-09 | Webhooks | Mailgun | https://documentation.mailgun.com/docs/mailgun/user-manual/webhooks/webhooks | Mailgun documents accepted, delivered, temporary_fail, permanent_fail, complained, and unsubscribed webhook events and calls out fallback-channel uses. |
| Mailgun | email | 2026-04-09 | Secure Your Webhooks | Mailgun | https://documentation.mailgun.com/docs/mailgun/user-manual/webhooks/securing-webhooks | Mailgun signs event requests with token, timestamp, and signature, recommends token caching for replay defense, and supports TLS client certificates. |
| Mailgun | email, combined | 2026-04-09 | API Overview | Mailgun | https://documentation.mailgun.com/docs/mailgun/api-reference/api-overview | Mailgun supports both US and EU regions and states that message data never leaves the region where it is processed. |
| Mailgun | email | 2026-04-09 | Sandbox Domain | Mailgun | https://documentation.mailgun.com/docs/mailgun/user-manual/domains/domains-sandbox | Each Mailgun account gets a sandbox domain limited to authorized recipients for safe integration testing. |
| Mailgun | email, combined | 2026-04-09 | Subaccounts Overview | Mailgun | https://documentation.mailgun.com/docs/mailgun/user-manual/subaccounts/subaccounts | Mailgun subaccounts separate domains, IPs, API keys, and users while rolling usage into the primary account. |
| Mailgun | email, combined | 2026-04-09 | Summary of Subaccount Features | Mailgun | https://documentation.mailgun.com/docs/mailgun/user-manual/subaccounts/subaccounts-features | Mailgun subaccounts expose event logs, reporting, template editing, sending domains, and webhooks at the subaccount level. |
| Postmark | email | 2026-04-09 | Sending email with API | Postmark | https://postmarkapp.com/developer/user-guide/send-email-with-api | Postmark uses per-server API tokens, requires confirmed sender signatures, and offers a special POSTMARK_API_TEST token for test sends. |
| Postmark | email | 2026-04-09 | Postmark Manual | https://postmarkapp.com/manual | Postmark documents sandbox mode, fake bounces, delivery webhooks, and message-stream separation for transactional versus broadcast traffic. |
| Postmark | email | 2026-04-09 | How do modular webhooks work? | Postmark | https://postmarkapp.com/support/article/1115-how-do-modular-webhooks-work | Postmark modular webhooks support event-type selection, send-test, custom headers, and optional basic HTTP auth, but the cited official guidance does not expose a signed or replay-safe callback mechanism. |
| Postmark | email | 2026-04-09 | Postmark Pricing and Free Trial | https://postmarkapp.com/pricing/ | Postmark publishes a free developer tier, server and stream limits, and configurable data-retention tiers. |
